LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFTS ALTA VISTA CO. & CMGI, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD & DECEIT) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE FRAUDULENT REPRESENTATIONS WITH PARTICULARITY. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SECURITY FRAUD SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE WHERE ALLEGED SECURITY VIOLATIONS TOOK PLACE. DEMURRER TO 1ST, 2ND & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION ON BASIS OF FORWARD LOOKING STATEMENTS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. DEMURER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE NO BASIS FOR FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION RE ALTA VISTA STATUS AS AIDER AND ABETTOR SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING LEGAL CONCLUSIONS) WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SECURITY FRAUD IS OVERRULED; THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES IS OVERRULED; AND THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 30 DAYS TO AMEND. Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Michael Q. Eagan, Esq. 765-4600 for pltf & opposing party; Andrea C. Evans, Esq. 391-5400 for defts & moving parties Alta Vista Company and CMGI, Inc.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling
(DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD & DECEIT) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE FRAUDULENT REPRESENTATIONS WITH PARTICULARITY.
DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SECURITY FRAUD SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE WHERE ALLEGED SECURITY VIOLATIONS TOOK PLACE.
DEMURRER TO 1ST, 2ND & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION ON BASIS OF FORWARD LOOKING STATEMENTS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE.
DEMURER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE NO BASIS FOR FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP.
DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION RE ALTA VISTA STATUS AS AIDER AND ABETTOR SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING LEGAL CONCLUSIONS)
with the exception that the 1st cause of action security fraud is overruled; the 4th cause of action unfair business practices is overruled; and the 5th cause of action breach of fiduciary duty is sustained with leave to amend. 30 days to amend. (AJR/CL)
